_publications._publicationTitle: Small Extracellular Vesicles Derived from NF2-Associated Schwannoma Cells Modulate Tumor Progression and Immunity via HSP90.

_contextSnippet: The size distribution analysis of the sEVs was performed using ZetaView (version 8.04.02), indicating that sEVs derived from NF2-associated schwannoma ranged in size from 50 to 200 nm
details: Successfully analyzed size distribution of sEVs derived from NF2-associated schwannoma, showing vesicles ranged in size from 50 to 200 nm
